text.title: agentic-rag-tool-using Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agentic-rag-tool-using as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing full tool results (potentially thousands of tokens) to the tool selector on subsequent iterations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The selector only needs to know what was gathered to decide what to gather next — a one-line summary per tool call is sufficient. Full results in the selector prompt inflate cost and can exceed context windows.

failure-mode.description: Including web_search in the tool registry for applications with data governance requirements without an explicit allow-list of approved domains.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unrestricted web search can retrieve adversarial content, hallucinated pages, or out-of-date information that conflicts with the vetted internal corpus. Gate web_search behind an allow-list or disable it by default.
